source: Library of Congress, Prints & Photographs Division — Panoramic Photographs Collection
license: No known restrictions on publication (public domain — pre-1928)
title: Seward, Alaska, 1915
description: 1915 panoramic photograph of Seward from the hillside above, showing the full town layout along Resurrection Bay with snow-capped Kenai Mountains across the water and the railroad pier extending into the bay.
alt: 1915 panoramic photograph of Seward, Alaska showing the town along Resurrection Bay with snow-capped mountains and railroad pier
